notes: Weekly banking: locked days keep their saved goal; bank spread now includes deficits and surpluses across remaining open days.
Weekly banking: optional setting to spread saved or overrun calories across remaining open days in the week.
AI uplift: Gemini estimates can be generated in-app from text or a photo using your saved API key.
AI quick log prompt and paste flow now better protect against double-counted servings.
maintenanceNote: Generated by scripts/prebuild.mjs from package.json and src/release-notes.json. Bump version with npm version patch (or edit package.json), edit release notes, then npm run build.
